functions.name: replaceMessage
functions.description: Replace a message with modified raw content, preserving flags and keywords. Uses nsIMsgCopyService.copyFileMessage() internally.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: The WebExtension message ID of the original message to replace.

parameters.name: rawData
parameters.description: The full RFC2822 raw message content as a binary (Latin-1) string.

deletePermanently.description: If true, the original is deleted permanently. If false, it is moved to Trash.
